top_signals.title: Congo Ebola Responders Stay on Strike as Africa CDC Pushes to Resolve Pay Dispute
top_signals.summary: Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention is working with the Democratic Republic of Congo to speed overdue payments to striking Ebola responders as the labor dispute threatens efforts to contain the world’s fastest-growing outbreak of the deadly disease.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: DeFi may be ‘quietly re-rating’ given outperformance against Bitcoin: Bitwise
top_signals.summary: “DeFi usually swings much harder than Bitcoin, so holding up this well is unusual,” says Bitwise, as DeFi tokens have outperformed Bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
